title: Alki Beach - All You SHOULD Know Before Going (2026 Reviews)
content: Alkai Beach is the best place I have found for open water swimming in the Seattle area. No barnacles and mostly sand for your entry and exit into the water.

title: Visiting Alki Beach in West Seattle - Facebook
content: Today I visited Alki Beach in West Seattle for the first time after admiring photos shared by others in the group. What a terrific place!
